questions.prompt: According to the Elaboration Likelihood Model, when people carefully analyze arguments and think deeply about a message, persuasion occurs through which route?
Which persuasion route usually produces longer-lasting attitude change?
In Asch's line study, participants conformed primarily because of:
In Milgram’s obedience study, participants continued administering shocks mainly because:
options: An authority figure instructed them to continue

questions.prompt: Which factor increases conformity the most in Asch-style experiments?

options: Improved performance on difficult tasks when others are present
Improved performance on easy tasks when others are present
Reduced performance on all tasks when observed

questions.prompt: When others are present, performance on difficult or unfamiliar tasks tends to:

options: People put in less effort in group work

questions.prompt: Group polarization means that after group discussion:
Groupthink is most likely when a group:
options: Is highly cohesive and insulated from outside opinions

questions.prompt: Which is NOT a symptom of groupthink?
Altruism is defined as helping behavior:
options: Done with no expectation of reward

questions.prompt: The 'feel bad – do good' effect suggests people help others in order to:

options: People are more helpful in groups
People are less likely to help when others are present

questions.prompt: Hostile aggression refers to aggression that is:
options: Used as a means to an end
Driven by anger and desire to harm
